description: v0.5 workstream C pilot: 14 real tokenized carbon credits (or pools) drawn from actually on-chain / tokenized instruments, hand-scored against the v0.4 rubric. Unlike the illustrative pilot in ../pilot-scoring/, every entry here corresponds to a specific real token on a real chain. Per-dimension scores are still author judgment based on public project documentation, academic analyses, and the v0.4 scoring rubrics.
important_disclaimers: Contract addresses and chain identifiers are best-effort based on documentation. Verify before relying on them.
Per-dimension scores are illustrative archetype scoring, NOT a formal rating of any specific project.
Pools (BCT, NCT, MCO2) are scored as the weighted average quality of their typical pool composition, not as a single credit.
The `commercial_rating_coverage` field lists which commercial agencies are known to rate this type of credit; it does NOT quote specific ratings.
`confidence` = high: contract address + archetype documented in literature; medium: archetype known but specifics may vary; low: known to exist but sparse documentation.

credits.name: Toucan BCT (Base Carbon Tonne)
credits.type: Pooled ERC-20 representing bridged Verra VCUs
credits.pool_composition_notes: Any Verra VCU from non-excluded methodology categories, vintage >= 2008. Historically dominated by older wind, REDD+, and HFC-destruction credits. HFC-23 later blocklisted.
credits.current_status: Declining. Most bridging halted after Verra 2022 statement restricting unauthorized tokenization.
commercial_rating_coverage: BeZero rates individual underlying VCUs (no pool rating)
Sylvera rates individual underlying VCUs (no pool rating)
MSCI 2025 does not rate tokenized pools as instruments
ICVCM CCP: pool is NOT CCP-eligible (mixes CCP and non-CCP credits)
credits.pool_score_basis: Weighted average of typical BCT composition as documented by CarbonPlan 2022 analysis and Frontiers in Blockchain 2024. Dominated by pre-2018 vintage low-integrity credits.

credits.name: Toucan NCT (Nature Carbon Tonne)
credits.type: Pooled ERC-20, nature-based subset of BCT
credits.tokenization_model: Bridge-and-pool with AFOLU filter and vintage >=2012
credits.pool_composition_notes: Stricter than BCT: only AFOLU methodologies, vintage >=2012. Still dominated by REDD+ and some afforestation projects.
credits.current_status: Smaller than BCT; similar bridging halt
commercial_rating_coverage: BeZero rates individual underlying VCUs
Sylvera: AFOLU methodologies are their core expertise; multiple individual AFOLU projects inside NCT have been rated
ICVCM CCP: not CCP-eligible as a pool
credits.pool_score_basis: Weighted average of typical NCT composition; improved over BCT due to AFOLU filter but still includes controversial REDD+ methodologies (VM0015 etc).

credits.name: Moss MCO2
credits.tokenization_model: Bridge, each MCO2 is 1 VCU but fungible
credits.pool_composition_notes: Historically ~80% Amazon REDD+ (Envira, Jari Para, Manoa, etc.)
credits.current_status: Active on Ethereum/Polygon; trading volume reduced since 2022 regulatory scrutiny
commercial_rating_coverage: BeZero rates several underlying Amazon REDD+ projects (results not cited here)
Sylvera rates several underlying Amazon REDD+ projects
Calyx Global rates Amazon REDD+ projects
West et al. 2023 systematically flagged Amazon REDD+ baselines as inflated
credits.pool_score_basis: Dominated by Amazon REDD+ whose baselines are subject to the systematic over-crediting documented in West et al. (Science, 2023).

credits.name: Nori NRT - Regenerative Agriculture
credits.type: Per-credit NFT representing soil carbon removal
credits.pool_composition_notes: Each NRT is a unique NFT representing a specific farm-year soil carbon removal.
credits.current_status: Active. Per Zhou et al. 2023, ~58% of transaction volume from large organizational buyers.
commercial_rating_coverage: Not widely rated by commercial agencies due to non-Verra registry
Academic coverage in Zhou et al. 2023 (IEEE Wireless Communications)
credits.pool_score_basis: Soil carbon has known permanence and measurement uncertainty challenges. Nori's per-credit NFT model is innovative but the registry is proprietary rather than ICVCM-assessed.

credits.name: Flowcarbon GNT (Goddess Nature Token)
credits.current_status: Defunct. Launch cancelled after Verra 2022 tokenization restriction; Celsius bankruptcy removed remaining backer.
commercial_rating_coverage: Not rated - never reached scale
Included here as a historical case: Flowcarbon is a good example of what grade-gated pools would have prevented
credits.pool_score_basis: Never audited as a pool. `failed_verification` disqualifier flagged because the tokenization pathway was never completed per Verra's standards.

credits.name: C3 C3T (Universal Base)
credits.tokenization_model: Bridge-and-pool with vintage and methodology filters
credits.pool_composition_notes: Multi-registry pool; offers tier variants with different eligibility
commercial_rating_coverage: Not rated as a pool; underlying credits may be covered
credits.pool_score_basis: Similar to NCT but across multiple registries. Quality varies by specific pool tier; this entry represents the universal base pool.

credits.name: Puro.earth CORC (Biochar, average)
credits.chain: Puro.earth registry (not bridged as primary token; some Supercritical tokenization)
credits.token_standard: N/A (registry attestation) + tokenized via Supercritical on Ethereum
credits.current_status: Active; Puro is the largest CDR-only registry
commercial_rating_coverage: Puro is newer and most commercial agencies do not yet rate it systematically
BeZero has begun covering CDR methodologies including Puro biochar
credits.pool_score_basis: Biochar is high-quality NBS removal with 1000+ year permanence when produced correctly. Puro's methodology is rigorous but not yet ICVCM-assessed.

credits.name: Isometric/Heirloom DAC attestation
credits.token_standard: N/A primary; Supercritical tokenizes on Ethereum
credits.current_status: Active; Heirloom began commercial sales in 2024
commercial_rating_coverage: Isometric publishes methodology openly; rating agencies are beginning to cover DAC methodologies
MSCI 2025 Integrity report notes DAC as the highest-integrity category
credits.pool_score_basis: Engineered DAC with mineralization permanence. Main detractor is co_benefits (now 0 weight under v0.4) and registry maturity (Isometric is newer than Verra/Gold Standard). v0.4 safeguards-gate now lets this reach AAA.

credits.name: Climeworks Orca via Puro
credits.chain: Puro.earth registry; some secondary market tokenization
credits.current_status: Active; Orca operational since 2021, Mammoth since 2024
commercial_rating_coverage: Puro + Isometric verified
MSCI 2025: DACCS is the highest-integrity category in their classification
credits.pool_score_basis: Gold standard for engineered CDR. Matches C001 in the illustrative pilot; this entry specifically represents the tokenized/attested form.

credits.name: Charm Industrial bio-oil
commercial_rating_coverage: Puro-rated
Frontier Fund publishes purchase decisions with quality rationale
credits.pool_score_basis: High-integrity engineered CDR with geological storage. Matches C004 in the illustrative pilot. Under v0.4 this cleanly reaches AAA; under v0.3 Rev-1+2 proposal it would have been stuck at AA because mrv_grade=82 missed the arbitrary 85 threshold.

credits.name: JPMorgan Kinexys (S&P Global pilot)
credits.chain: JPMorgan Kinexys (private permissioned) + public chain partners
credits.token_standard: Private-chain native, some public bridging via S&P Global
credits.underlying_registry: EcoRegistry + International Carbon Registry + S&P Global Commodity Insights
credits.pool_composition_notes: Launched 2025; structured as tokenization at the moment of issuance, avoiding the provenance gap that undermined Toucan.
credits.current_status: Early-stage launch 2025; Kinexys paper published early 2025
commercial_rating_coverage: S&P Global Commodity Insights is a primary data partner (not a rating agency)
Too new for BeZero/Sylvera/Calyx systematic coverage
credits.pool_score_basis: Promising tokenization model (registry-native, not bridged post-hoc). Underlying credit quality depends on which registries and methodologies participate; early indicators suggest a mix spanning quality tiers.

credits.name: Open Forest Protocol credit
credits.tokenization_model: Distributed verifier network with satellite + smartphone monitoring
credits.pool_composition_notes: Operational in ~20 countries per 2024 OFP report
credits.current_status: Active; distinctive approach with decentralized MRV
commercial_rating_coverage: Not covered by traditional commercial rating agencies
Academic interest as a dMRV case study
credits.pool_score_basis: Strong MRV via decentralized verifiers; nature-based removal; registry is very new (low registry score). v0.4 rewards the strong MRV dimension.

credits.name: Regen Network NCT (Cosmos)
commercial_rating_coverage: Not covered by commercial agencies (non-Verra registry)
credits.pool_score_basis: Regen is a legitimate but small registry. Land management methodologies have known permanence challenges.

credits.name: Toucan CHAR pool (Base, biochar)
credits.type: Quality-gated biochar carbon pool on Base
credits.pool_composition_notes: Biochar credits from Puro-certified projects. CHAR uses checkEligible() to allowlist specific projects and a dynamic fee mechanism to penalize over-concentration.
credits.current_status: Active on Base and Celo; the most selective Toucan pool
commercial_rating_coverage: Puro-certified; individual projects within the pool may have BeZero biochar ratings
credits.pool_score_basis: Higher quality than BCT/NCT because of biochar-specific allowlist and Puro certification. The pool health adjustment fee is a novel risk mitigation mechanism not present in BCT/NCT.

credits.name: Rainbow Standard biochar credit
credits.tokenization_model: Registry-native; some secondary market tokenization possible
credits.pool_composition_notes: Biochar from European and global producers. Rainbow gained ICVCM CCP-Eligible status in 2025.
credits.current_status: Active; 80+ projects, 400K+ credits issued, ~6% durable CDR market share
commercial_rating_coverage: Rainbow is newer; commercial agencies beginning to cover CDR registries
CCP-Eligible status from ICVCM provides a baseline quality signal
credits.pool_score_basis: Similar to Puro biochar but with CCP-Eligible status. Registry is newer and smaller; methodology quality is reportedly comparable to Puro's biochar standard.

credits.name: Toucan TCO2 - Kariba REDD+ (historical)
credits.type: Individual Verra VCU tokenized as TCO2
credits.pool_composition_notes: Specific to Kariba REDD+ (Zimbabwe), widely flagged for integrity issues
credits.current_status: Historical. Kariba flagged by Carbon Market Watch and multiple academic analyses.
commercial_rating_coverage: BeZero: publicly rated low
Sylvera: publicly rated low
Calyx Global: publicly rated low
Carbon Market Watch 2023 investigation documented integrity failures
credits.pool_score_basis: Included because Kariba is the canonical example of a low-integrity REDD+ project that nevertheless ended up in tokenized form. Matches C022 in the illustrative pilot.
